docs.title: Order Submission
docs.text:
Receives an order request, validates customer data, creates an invoice, and records that an audit/event publication step is dynamically invoked.

  • Owners: Order Management Team, Integration Team
  • Tags: order, billing, example
  • Entrypoints: com.example.order:submitOrder
  • Services reached: 3
  • External dependencies: 2
  • Risks or unknowns: 2

docs.title: Order Submission
docs.text: Receives an order request, validates customer data, creates an invoice, and records that an audit/event publication step is dynamically invoked.

docs.title: 1. Receive request
docs.text:
Accept the order submission request and orchestrate downstream work.

  • com.example.order:submitOrder

docs.title: 2. Validate customer
docs.text:
Confirm that customer data is usable before billing.

  • com.example.customer:validateCustomer

docs.title: 3. Create invoice
docs.text:
Create an invoice using a Java service whose implementation source is unresolved in this sample.

  • com.example.billing:createInvoice

docs.text: No supporting technical services outside configured business steps.
